---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea to improve the project
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or approaches you considered.

## Use Case

Who benefits and how?

## Additional Context

Mockups, examples, links, or related issues.

## Be Kind

Please keep suggestions respectful and constructive. Different viewpoints are welcome when discussed with clarity and empathy.
